results.title: Taylor blames Albanese’s budget for plummeting Coalition vote as One Nation surges
results.description: After a fourth poll showed One Nation inching ahead of Labor, Angus Taylor told this masthead that Labor’s budget had “further eroded trust in the political system”.

results.title: Tune in to the 2026 Pokémon North America International Championships June 12th to 14th, 2026
150 Ryanair passengers stranded following long queues
results.description: Around 150 Ryanair passengers were left behind at Toulouse Airport last week after becoming trapped in lengthy border control queues that prevented them from reaching their gate before boarding closed.

results.title: WCREEC student housing named for Don and Gloria Clanton
results.description: The new student housing at the West Central Research, Extension and Education Center in North Platte, has been named for Don and Gloria Clanton.

results.title: NAF deploys surveillance aircraft to aid rescue of abducted Oyo teachers, pupils
results.description: The Nigerian Air Force (NAF) has deployed a surveillance aircraft to support ongoing efforts to rescue teachers and pupils abducted from Yawota and Ahoro-Esinle communities in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State. The development was disclosed by Governor Seyi Makinde during a courtesy visit by the representative of the Chief of the Air Staff, [...] The post NAF deploys surveillance aircraft to aid rescue of abducted Oyo teachers, pupils appeared first on Ghanamma.com .

results.title: World Brain Tumour Day: University of Toronto Alumnus Launches 70KM for $70K Challenge After Losing 40-Year-Old Mother to Glioblastoma
results.description: On September 19, 2026, Noah Lee will embark on a 70-kilometre journey from the University of Toronto to McMaster University, with an ambitious goal of raising $70,000 for brain cancer research. Motivated by the memory of his mother, Sejin Lee, who died after her battle with glioblastoma at just 40 years old, Noah is honouring [...]

results.title: FIFA tickets purchased by Toronto being resold to ‘avoid spending property tax dollars’ on tournament: mayor’s office
results.description: Mayor Olivia Chow’s office is defending the city’s decision to resell tickets it purchased for the FIFA World Cup to corporate sponsors at a profit, saying that the move was done to reduce the number of tax dollars directed to staging the tournament.

results.title: Work on 448-metre ROB on Cochrane Basin Road to start by next week
results.description: Corporation officials stated that the ROB would reduce traffic congestion in North Chennai and provide relief to residents of Tondiarpet, Korukkupet, and their neighbourhoods.

Steelworkers welcome bill to close anti-scab loophole, strengthen workers’ right to strike
results.description: OTTAWA, Ontario, June 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) — The United Steelworkers union (USW) is welcoming legislation introduced today by NDP Parliamentary Leader Don Davies to close a loophole in federal anti-scab legislation that allows employers to use outside managers as replacement workers during labour disputes. USW National Director Marty Warren and USW Local 1944 President [...]
